title: Checkpoint: first sentences
pedagogy: Checkpoint over sent-01/02/03, nothing new taught. The request frame returns with the female particle (ขอข้าวหน่อยค่ะ — kho R: high ข + live; khao F: high ข + mai tho; noi L: ห-nam + mai ek; kha F: low ค + mai ek); วันนี้ร้อนมาก is rebuilt by ear; price listening sets the digit-order trap สามสิบห้า 35 vs ห้าสิบสาม 53; the verb-echo question is blanked on its verb (มี___ไหมคะ against เอา/กิน); particles are pinned on a question (อันนี้เท่าไหร่คะ); and the dialogue turn is taken as a female speaker for the first time. The engine appends due-card callbacks from outside the unit and weak-tone drills at runtime. Pass = accuracy ≥ 0.8 → normal completion; fail → no completion (unit 12 stays gated, retry immediate) but SRS and tone stats still update. All per-syllable tones verify against each token's vocab toneReason via wordId.

exercises.meaning: Could I get some rice, please? (female speaker)
exercises.explanation: A woman making a request closes on falling ค่ะ. ครับ is the male particle, and high-tone คะ marks questions — a request is a statement.
วัน + นี้ composes 'today'; the weather report follows with no 'is': ร้อนมาก.

exercises.thai: สามสิบห้าบาท

choices.thai: สามสิบห้าบาท
ห้าสิบสามบาท

exercises.explanation: สามสิบ 30, then ห้า on the end: 35. Reversed, ห้าสิบสาม is 53 — digit order is the whole price.

exercises.meaning: Do you have water? (a woman asking a vendor)
exercises.explanation: มี asks about having — the stock-check question. เอาน้ำไหมคะ would offer the water, and กินน้ำไหมคะ invites someone to drink it: same frame, three verbs, three different questions.

exercises.context: Evening at a street-food stall — this time you're a woman, and you want rice. The vendor looks up:
exercises.question: How do you order?

choices.thai: ขอข้าวหน่อยค่ะ
choices.note: The request frame, closed with ค่ะ — the same sentence you built as a man in the first lesson, now in your own voice.
She'll bring the rice — but bare เอา with no particle is for a friend holding the pot. ค่ะ at minimum.

choices.thai: ขอน้ำหน่อยค่ะ
choices.note: Perfectly polite — and it orders water. The frame is right; the thing in the middle slot isn't.
Thanking her — for what? Nothing's been ordered yet. ขอบคุณ comes when the plate lands.

exercises.meaning: Is it spicy? (a woman asking before she orders)
exercises.explanation: Verb + ไหม + คะ — the yes/no check. ค่ะ never follows ไหม; questions rise to คะ.

choices.thai: ไปยังไงครับ
ไปเมื่อไหร่ครับ

exercises.explanation: ไป opens all three — the ear's job is the question word: ไหน, ยังไง, เมื่อไหร่.

exercises.meaning: How much is this one? (a woman asking)
exercises.explanation: Price questions end on the question particle — for a woman, high-tone คะ. Falling ค่ะ would close a statement she isn't making.

exercises.thai: เอาน้ำไหมคะ

choices.thai: เอาน้ำไหมคะ
มีน้ำไหมคะ

exercises.explanation: Three water sentences, three openers: เอา offers, มี checks stock, ขอ asks for it. The first word is the whole transaction.
